title: Introduction to HTML & CSS
description: Build your first webpage with headings, paragraphs, and styles.

tasks.title: Your First Heading
tasks.explainer:
HTML uses **tags** to structure content. The `

` tag makes a big heading. ```html

Hello, World!

``` Add an `

` heading to the page. Run it to see the result.

starterFiles.name: index.html
starterFiles.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>My Page</title>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- Add your heading here -->

</body>
</html>

tasks.title: Paragraphs and Styles

starterFiles.name: index.html
starterFiles.content: Hello, World!

starterFiles.name: style.css

tasks.title: Adding a Button
tasks.explainer:
A `<button>` element creates a clickable button. Add JavaScript to make it do something!

```html
<button onclick="alert('Hello!')">Click me</button>
```

Add a button that shows an alert when clicked.

starterFiles.name: index.html
starterFiles.content:
Hello, World!

Welcome to my page!

starterFiles.name: style.css
